public fun build(): Url {
    applyOrigin()
    return Url(
        protocol = protocolOrNull,
        host = host,
        specifiedPort = port,
        pathSegments = pathSegments,
        parameters = parameters.build(),
        fragment = fragment,
        user = user,
        password = password,
        trailingQuery = trailingQuery,
        urlString = buildString()
    )
}
